raw_consumer_statement: I ordered some items on XXXX XXXX and my items was supposed to deliver to my address. I didn't receive my package and addressed it to the merchant and also to my credit card and they told me that they will dispute it and should get an answer 7 to 10 business days and after that they told me that they investigate it and that the charges are valid, the only thing they did was to track the tracking info in XXXX  and shows delivered. There isn't any picture or proof of delivery. I called XXXX and tried to do a claim and they told me that the merchant didn't reach out to them to file a claim and that they are the only one that can file a claim since they are the merchant. To be honest, they are really incompetent, they aren't doing their jobs and always like to their customers extending the debt and now every month I'm being charged interest.
